creator: wenheping2000@hotmail.com
text:
Hi, maintainer: 

  Now there is hwloc2, we shall repocopy it from hwloc, we have 2 selects:

  1 repocopy hwloc --> hwloc1 and update hwloc to 2.0.1
  2 repocopy hwloc --> hwloc2 and keep hwloc as now

  I suggest we select way 2, beacause many ports which depends on hwloc1 could not build with hwloc2, if we select way 1 we shall make big changes to ports tree.

  How do you think about it ?

Regards,
wen
